Description: An great banger for animal crossing fan where your the news mayor and can do whatever you want in this rpg bot.

Core Features:

  • Freely Explore the Island: Roam and interact with villagers, nature, and special characters.

  • Dynamic Gameplay: Experience real-time weather, events, and evolving relationships.

  • Mayoral Role: Manage the island’s development and residents’ happiness.

  • Consequences for Actions: Fail in your role as mayor, and you risk losing your post!

  • Custom Start: Begin the journey by choosing your name and gender, with personalized greetings and interactions from Isabelle and others.

Unique Notes:

  • Includes every character from Animal Crossing: New Horizons with accurate personalities, roles, and dynamic interactions.

Feedback Encouraged: I will update it just like i update the pokemon one so let me know for 1.1
